title: Nizam QA Verdict Schema
description: Validates .agent/qa/NNN.json, the evaluator's pass/fail verdict for a feature, recording each verification command's exit code and an evidence file path per DD-3.

feature_id.description: Id of the feature this verdict evaluates.

verdict.description: The overall QA outcome for this feature.

executed_at.description: Date or date-time the QA checks were executed.

checks.description: One entry per contract verification command that was executed.

evidence.description: Path to the externalised evidence file capturing this check's terminal output.

adversarial_check.description: The evaluator's own additional adversarial spot-check, beyond the contract's listed verification commands.

required_fixes.description: Fixes the generator must make before this feature can pass QA. Empty when verdict is 'pass'.
